command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/setup_hermes.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Check binary
ls -la /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
file /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent --version 2>&1 | head -3
# Check gateway config
cat /home/jose/.hermes/gateway_state.json 2>/dev/null | head -20
SHEOF
bash /tmp/setup_hermes.sh"
